message:
fix: http_response_read error propagation + hoist test worker codecs

- pymode_imports.c: http_response_read now raises OSError on n < 0
  instead of silently returning empty bytes
- test/worker.ts: Pre-encode stdlib at module load (same as production)
- test/pydantic-worker.ts: Same stdlib pre-encoding optimization
- cli/lib/variants.js: Fix hardcoded numpy error message to use variantKey
